one_time_description: Accommodation agreements received from Fraser Health Authority ($7,722,000) and ICBC ($12,698,000) in connection with disposition of lands on traditional territory, contributed as capital to Matsqui Development Limited Partnership for purchase of 2179 McCallum Road. Recorded as Other Revenue of $21,533,557.
economic_notes: Nation is part of Sto:lo Nation encompassing 11 communities between Langley and Boston Bar, located in Fraser Valley near Abbotsford BC. GBEs include forestry operations and land development at 2179 McCallum Road. COVID-19 noted as having potential material impact on operations. Nation guaranteed RBC mortgages for members totalling $1,221,546.
notes: Large one-time accommodation agreements from FHA and ICBC totalling ~$20.42M drove the $21.78M surplus and massive jump in accumulated surplus from $7.78M to $29.56M. Investment in GBEs jumped from $478K to $20.75M due to Matsqui Development Limited Partnership receiving land proceeds. Temporary investments of $2.6M are fully restricted (Minors Trust Funds). Prior year figures were restated for two adjustments: ISC deferred revenue correction and removal of LMS Society consolidation. 4 GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. 1 subsidiary (2179 McCallum Nominee Ltd.) consolidated line-by-line. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Gov of Canada + CMHC + Other FN Governments + Province of BC + BC First Nation Gaming = $2,443,984; OSR includes lease/rental, property taxation, contract revenue, other revenue, interest, and loss from GBEs.
